title: Family forest selfie (4 chars, tight close-up framing)
prompt: EXTREME close-up selfie — 4 FACES ONLY in the frame and absolutely nothing else visible behind them. The composition is so tight the frame contains exactly 4 face-portraits and they fill 100% of the visible space. POSITIONS — strictly anchored, NO additional people anywhere: @Papa's face fills the LOWER-RIGHT QUADRANT (closest to the lens, slightly larger as the selfie-arm holder, big toothy grin, beard, glasses). @Mama's face fills the LOWER-LEFT QUADRANT (squished against Papa's shoulder, beaming, blonde hair). @Sara's face fills the UPPER-LEFT QUADRANT (curly chestnut hair fluffing in from the top-left, eyes wide with joy, freckles). @Eva's face fills the UPPER-RIGHT QUADRANT (curly blonde with rainbow bow, tongue stuck out playfully, eyes squeezed shut in laughter). The 4 heads are pressed shoulder-to-shoulder leaving zero gap between them and zero background visible. Just barely glimpsable at the absolute corner edges of the frame, between hair strands: the black @jeep-wrangler tailgate with license plate 'SARA AND EVA' visible behind Papa's shoulder, and a hint of pine trunks of @magic-forest-sandy at the very edges. The faces are SO LARGE that the Jeep and forest are mostly OBSCURED by hair and shoulders. ONLY 4 PEOPLE — exactly 1 dad, exactly 1 mom, exactly 2 kids (one with chestnut curly hair, one with blonde curly hair and rainbow bow). NO fifth child, NO fifth face, NO partial face peeking from anywhere. Papa (grinning huge): "MAGIC FOREST FAMILY SELFIE!" Mama: "Get the trees in!" Sara: "SMILE!" Eva (tongue out): "BUUUUUR!"
